news.title: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran’s oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to 'immediately' reopen Hormuz Strait
news.title_cn: 川普稱美國將摧毀伊朗油井和哈爾格島，但未達成協議「立即」重新開放霍爾木茲海峽

news.title: Russia welcomes arrival of oil tanker in Cuba after Trump softens approach to U.S. blockade
news.title_cn: 在川普軟化對美國封鎖的態度後，俄羅斯歡迎油輪抵達古巴

news.title: Trump reportedly wants to 'take the oil in Iran' as Tehran targets water, power facilities in Kuwait
news.title_cn: 據報道，川普希望“奪取伊朗的石油”，因為德黑蘭瞄準了科威特的水和電力設施

news.title: Pakistan prepared to host U.S.-Iran talks in 'coming days' as Trump weighs deploying ground troops
news.title_cn: 隨著川普考慮部署地面部隊，巴基斯坦準備在「未來幾天」主辦美伊會談

news.title: Mistral secures $830 million in debt financing to fund AI data center
news.title_cn: Mistral 獲得 8.3 億美元債務融資，為人工智慧資料中心提供資金

news.title: Buy this cruise line operator that's trading at a discount, says HSBC
news.title_cn: 匯豐銀行表示，收購這家以折扣價交易的郵輪業者

news.title: The market’s wobble amid Iran war has left world-beating U.S. stocks ‘extremely cheap,’ says Bill Ackman
news.title_cn: 伊朗戰爭期間市場的波動使得領先世界的美國股市“極其便宜”，比爾·阿克曼說

news.title: The S&P 500’s correction is ‘getting closer to its ending,’ says Morgan Stanley’s Mike Wilson
news.title_cn: 標準普爾 500 指數的調整“越來越接近終點”，摩根士丹利的邁克威爾遜說
